_metadata.match: Houston Dynamo FC vs San Diego FC

hector_herrera.bio: Futbolista profesional en @houstondynamo | Campañas: @staypro | Rosarito beach
hector_herrera.note: The @hectorherrera16 handle does NOT resolve to his account. Use @h.herrera16.

jeppe_tverskov.note: Has Instagram but barely uses it — 6.6K followers for a team captain is giving 'boyfriend who doesn't do social.'

anders_dreyer.note: Bio is all business inquiries, no personality. 2025 MLS MVP runner-up energy.

marcus_ingvartsen.bio: Player of @sandiegofc | Interested in Business | Performance | Mindset | Founder of…

mcglynn.source: FotMob lineup page lists Jack McGlynn as unavailable (injury) for April 22 match
mcglynn.replacement: Samassékou + Bouzat continue as double pivot. Guilherme takes set pieces.

still_out: Lucas Halter (lower body, expected return mid-May)

san_diego_injury_disaster.headline: SDFC bringing a glorified B-team to Houston — 9 players out

out_list.name: Luca Bombino
out_list.note: Scored last week, now injured. Huge loss.

out_list.name: Pablo Sisniega
out_list.note: Lower back — Duran Ferree (22yo) likely in goal

out_list.name: Kieran Sargeant
out_list.note: Lower body, trained this week but not fit

out_list.name: Amahl Pellegrino
out_list.note: Achilles — returned to bench at RSL, questionable for Houston

suspension_cleared.name: Chris McVey
suspension_cleared.note: Red card in 3 straight starts (latest vs Minnesota 4/11 — second yellow in 46th min). Ban served, available tonight. BUT he's a walking yellow card waiting to happen.

last_5_matches: Drew 2-2 at Real Salt Lake (4/18) — Pellegrino returned to bench
Lost 2-1 vs Minnesota (4/11) — McVey red card
Lost 3-0 at San Jose (4/4) — Dreyer: 1 shot, 0 on goal
san_diego_form.trend: 3 losses + 2 draws in last 5. Winless streak + mounting reds + injury list = crisis mode.

lineup.GK: Duran Ferree (22yo, only 1 MLS start ever)

opta_win_probability.note: Houston are favorites for first time this season. SD -102 on moneyline per oddstrader.

key_storylines.first_meeting_2026: First matchup of the season between the two. Last year Houston beat SD 4-3 in July — SD's worst defensive match of their expansion season.
key_storylines.dreyer_watch: Anders Dreyer finished 2025 as MLS MVP runner-up. 3G/1A this season. Leads SD in crosses every single game. Houston needs to lock him down.
key_storylines.mcvey_ticking_bomb: Chris McVey has a red card in 3 consecutive starts. Literally cannot stop himself. Give Ponce the ball in transition.
key_storylines.ingvartsen_vs_houston_history: Marcus Ingvartsen reunion — matched against Guilherme's form (5G/4A in 6 matches, tied Navarro for most contributions in MLS).
key_storylines.sdfc_depth_crisis: With 9 out, San Diego's bench might be teenagers and academy call-ups. Ferree starting in goal is huge — he only has 1 MLS start ever (final match of 2025).
